mainline.contradiction: Turn the regenerated baseline into one reviewable, human-governed starting point without losing unresolved review, runtime, or continuity work.
acceptance: Every active side branch has an explicit return record.
The baseline receives content review, operational review, and a Principal disposition.

branches.purpose: Resolve the retained external review observations with evidence-backed dispositions.
branches.returnCondition: Every retained review thread has an explicit reply and resolve or reject action.
branches.mainlineDelta: All three retained external review threads were resolved before Principal-confirmed PR #13 merge commit fa571ae615400c8c2c30444e13cde0039dba2e73.

branches.purpose: Finish and review the bounded deliberation CLI pilot without giving it governance authority.
branches.returnCondition: The implementation and deterministic checks are ready to enter the founding baseline.

branches.purpose: Establish and verify Git-tracked return contracts for material mission branches.
branches.returnCondition: The first active record validates, documents its Git boundary, and is ready to enter the founding baseline.

branches.purpose: Design the formal organization in which Sequence and mandate guide an administrative operating system, while Work Cells remain bounded execution units.
branches.returnCondition: Produce a reviewable organization constitution covering direction, planning, administration, execution, statistics, inspection, correction, and human commitment boundaries.

branches.purpose: Reduce the manual docket-construction burden, constrain context before model calls, preserve every invocation record, and make the allocation boundary truthful.
branches.returnCondition: A project-facing deliberation interaction lowers a concise docket into bounded member inputs, retains unique invocation records, and is verified against submission success, token observation, and the no-authority boundary.

branches.purpose: Make verification select evidence by a real claim and credible failure mode, rather than accumulating decorative unit assertions.
branches.returnCondition: The existing development discipline states the test-value gate, and the deliberation retention regression is demonstrated through the persisted user-facing behavior.

branches.purpose: Prepare and, only after a separately approved envelope, run a bounded independent vote on the next founding mission without granting the vote commitment authority.
branches.returnCondition: The vote has a retained docket, Work Estimate, an enforced campaign-envelope disposition, raw member records or explicit human-only route, verifier observation, and Principal A/B/C/D resolution.

branches.purpose: Settle the current Work Cell completion-contract convergence and advisory correction binding as one independently reviewed checkpoint.
branches.returnCondition: A traceable AI review packet, current deterministic evidence, and a Principal commit/push/merge or return disposition are retained.
branches.mainlineDelta: The reviewed checkpoint, deterministic verification, and Principal-confirmed PR #13 merge are retained in the integration disposition.
